name: SidebarLayout
description: Two-column layout with intrinsic-width sidebar and flexible content area. Uses CSS Grid for robust sizing.
whenToUse: Main application layouts with navigation sidebar + content area. Documentation sites with TOC sidebar.
avoidWhen: You need the interactive navigation Sidebar component - use SidebarRoot instead. Simple side-by-side layouts - use Stack with direction='horizontal'.

side.description: Which side the sidebar appears on.

gap.description: Gestalt-based spacing between sidebar and content.

sidebarWidth.description: Explicit sidebar width. Omit for intrinsic width based on content.

collapsible.description: Allow sidebar to collapse (requires collapse logic in SidebarLayoutSidebar).

parts.name: SidebarLayoutSidebar
parts.description: Sidebar region within a SidebarLayout. Has intrinsic width by default.
parts.whenToUse: Always inside a SidebarLayout. Contains navigation, TOC, or other sidebar content.

width.description: Intrinsic width override. Uses parent's sidebarWidth if omitted.

parts.name: SidebarLayoutContent
parts.description: Main content region within a SidebarLayout. Fills remaining space.
parts.whenToUse: Always inside a SidebarLayout. Contains the primary page content.
